description: Letter (ending only) addressed to David b. Naʿim and Moshe b. Naʿim in Alexandria ( נא אמון). Written in Judaeo-Arabic (body) and Ladino (address). Dating: Late 18th or early 19th century. Needs examination for content. May belong with one or more of the nearby shelfmarks.
description_he: מכתב בJudaeo-Arabic, Ladino לאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
